positive: Stylized cosmic flora composition, featuring bioluminescent deep-sea lotuses and nebulae-infused cosmic vines, arranged in a symmetrical, circular mandala pattern. The subject should have crisp, clean silhouettes and strong contrast between glowing teal/magenta floral elements and a deep indigo/black background. Art style: Neo-Victorian botanical illustration mixed with cosmic vaporwave aesthetics. Composition: Central, balanced, high-contrast pop art print suitable for repeating apparel pattern. Cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, vaporwave color palette, high contrast, vector art quality.
